<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Creates a graph-visible D586 complete-next-record materializer bundle.

The bundle turns current records plus materialization intents into ordinary
proposal DATA. It does not wire those proposals into admission/application,
storage, hydration, durable commit, or same-evaluation evidence feedback.

## Import

```ts
import { agenticMemoryRecordMaterializerBundle } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions";
```

## Signature

```ts
function agenticMemoryRecordMaterializerBundle(
	graph: Graph,
	opts: AgenticMemoryRecordMaterializerBundleOptions<T>,
): AgenticMemoryRecordMaterializerBundle<T>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `graph` | `Graph` | Graph that owns the created nodes. |
| `opts` | `AgenticMemoryRecordMaterializerBundleOptions<T>` | Records and intents input nodes plus optional materializer id/name. |

## Returns

Projection node plus proposal/candidate/status/issues/audit/cursor nodes.
